hero.headline: Your condition is specific. Your nutrition plan should be, too.
hero.subheadline: Piedmont Nutrition Care provides evidence-based Medical Nutrition Therapy for chronic metabolic, gastrointestinal, and weight-related conditions. Select your condition below to see how a root-cause, food-chemistry approach applies to your specific situation.

conditions.title: Diabetes & Blood Sugar Management
conditions.hook: A1C reduction, insulin sensitivity, and blood sugar stabilization through food chemistry — not just calorie restriction.

conditions.title: IBS & Digestive Disorders
conditions.hook: Bloating, abdominal pain, and unpredictable bowel habits resolved through targeted gut microbiome restoration.

conditions.title: Oncology Nutrition
conditions.hook: Post-treatment gut recovery, immune support, and weight management for cancer survivors.

conditions.title: Cardiovascular Health
conditions.hook: Cholesterol optimization and blood pressure support through targeted food chemistry protocols.

conditions.title: Sustainable Weight Management
conditions.hook: Root-cause metabolic repair, GLP-1 medication off-ramp support, and perimenopause weight resistance solutions.
